violations.text: Salad (lettuce and tomato) and yogurt were observed held between 45-73 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC relocated yogurt in a working cooler unit and placed salad in the 2 door cooler for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the front and back, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Establishment lacks 3 bay compartments. Only two bays were observed. Per interview with PIC, establishment hired repair person to install second divider (making it a 3 bay sink). Repair person arrived onsite and fixed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The ceiling tile in the kitchen area is in poor repair (missing tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC replaced during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the deli area (deli display and ban saw) and outside areas (ice machine and other equipment). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC replenished. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs and meat) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as produce and ham) in the kitchen refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated raw items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Ham deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC wrote date during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The doors to the outside, located in the front, kitchen and walk-in cooler (dry storage), are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Various items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler (dry storage area). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Hand-washing sink in the kitchen and deli area needs splash guards to prevent contamination during food preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

Wood is used in the construction of open case cooler in the retail area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The hot-holding unit located in the service area was not in good repair (ambient of 125F). PIC to use top section of unit to keep food hot. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Embellishment lacks 3 bay sink compartments. Only two bays were observed (third was removed). New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the 5 door cooler unit and freezer chests have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the dish sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The two doors to the toilet room are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The oil receptacle outside is located on soil. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair (missing ceiling tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the deli area (deli display cooler and meat saw) and outside areas (ice machine and other equipment). Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026
